title: Mediterranean Prawn Ceviche
description: A refreshing and light dish perfect for a summer evening. Raw prawns marinated in a zesty Mediterranean sauce.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine prawns, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well to coat the prawns evenly.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the prawns to marinate.
Just before serving, stir in the chopped parsley and dill.
Serve chilled, garnished with additional parsley and dill if desired.
Note: Make sure to handle the prawns safely and cook them to an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C) or above.
Serve immediately, or refrigerate for up to 2 hours before serving.
Garnish with lemon wedges and serve with crusty bread or pita chips.
